sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46514" key="zw|ofagi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζῳοφᾰγ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n46514.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a living on animal food</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:628b:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">628b13</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:2:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.27</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:4:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
